data.title: Tsui Wah Holdings Reports Decline in Annual Revenue and Profit
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Tsui Wah Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1314) ).

Tsui Wah Holdings Limited reported a decline in revenue by 5% for the year ending March 31, 2025, compared to the previous year. The company’s profit also saw a significant drop of 65.5%, with earnings per share decreasing by 67.8%. Despite these challenges, the company expanded its restaurant count in Hong Kong and Singapore, indicating a strategic focus on these markets.

More about Tsui Wah Holdings Ltd.

Tsui Wah Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating primarily in the restaurant industry. The company has a presence in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Macau, and Singapore, with a focus on providing food services through its chain of restaurants.

Average Trading Volume: 732,344

Current Market Cap: HK$296.4M

data.description:

Autozi Internet Technology (Global) Ltd. Class A ( (AZI) ) has provided an announcement.

On June 26, 2025, Autozi Internet Technology (Global) Ltd. announced the approval of the second amendment and restatement of its 2024 Equity Incentive Plan by its board of directors. The amendment increases the maximum number of Class A ordinary shares reserved under the plan from 12 million to 18 million. This move is aimed at enhancing the company’s ability to attract and retain skilled personnel, thereby promoting its overall success and competitiveness in the market.

More about Autozi Internet Technology (Global) Ltd. Class A

Autozi Internet Technology (Global) Ltd. operates in the technology sector, focusing on internet-based services. The company is involved in providing equity incentive plans to attract and retain top talent, which is crucial for its growth and success.

data.title: Bank of Gansu Co., Ltd. Announces Successful 2024 AGM with All Resolutions Passed
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from Bank of Gansu Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2139) ) is now available.

Bank of Gansu Co., Ltd. successfully held its 2024 Annual General Meeting (AGM) on June 27, 2025, where all proposed resolutions were passed. The meeting, presided over by Chairman Liu Qing, complied with relevant laws and regulations, and saw participation from shareholders holding approximately 78.55% of the total shares. Key resolutions included the approval of the 2024 work reports, financial accounts, profit distribution plan, and the re-appointment of ShineWing as the auditing firm. The AGM results reflect strong shareholder support and are expected to positively impact the bank’s strategic direction and operational stability.

More about Bank of Gansu Co., Ltd. Class H

Bank of Gansu Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the banking industry. The company provides a range of financial services and products, focusing on serving the local market in Gansu Province, China.

An update from Good Shroom Co Inc ( (TSE:MUSH) ) is now available.

Mercanto Holdings Inc. reported a decline in Q3 2025 financial results, with revenue and net profit dropping compared to the previous year, largely due to the rationalization process in Quebec and broader industry challenges. Despite these setbacks, the company is strategically positioning itself for future growth by entering the vape market, securing a key battery listing, and focusing on margin-improving products, which could enhance its market position and financial performance in the medium to long term.

However, technical analysis shows some short-term momentum, and the recent corporate events regarding product expansion are positive for future growth potential. The valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings. Overall, while there are opportunities for improvement, significant risks remain.

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Caledonia Investments PLC ( (GB:CLDN) ) has provided an update.

Caledonia Investments PLC announced a series of transactions involving its director, Jamie Cayzer-Colvin, who received 16,186 shares under the company’s performance share scheme and deferred bonus plan. Following the transactions, which included selling shares to meet tax liabilities and to a family member, Cayzer-Colvin’s beneficial interest in the company increased, reflecting a strategic move that may impact shareholder dynamics and company governance.

Spark’s Take on GB:CLDN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CLDN is a Outperform.

Caledonia Investments PLC has a strong financial foundation with high profitability and a robust, debt-free balance sheet. The strategic execution of share buybacks further supports shareholder value. However, mixed technical signals and a moderate valuation suggest cautious optimism. Despite some revenue volatility, the company’s financial stability positions it well in the asset management industry.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CLDN stock, click here.

More about Caledonia Investments PLC

Caledonia Investments PLC is a UK-based investment trust company primarily engaged in managing a diversified portfolio of global investments. The company focuses on delivering long-term capital growth and income through a combination of direct and indirect investments across various sectors.

data.title: Hon Hai Precision Industry Expands Investment in China’s Semiconductor Sector
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has provided an announcement.

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. has announced a significant investment in mainland China, involving a capital increase and equity purchase totaling RMB 231,945,800. This strategic move includes acquiring equity in Kore Semiconductor Co., Ltd., a company specializing in semiconductor wafer bumping and carrier board processing. This investment is part of Hon Hai’s long-term strategic plans to strengthen its position in the semiconductor industry, reflecting its commitment to expanding its footprint in the Chinese market.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., also known as Foxconn, is a prominent player in the electronics manufacturing industry. The company is known for its production of electronic components and devices, with a significant focus on the global technology market.

An announcement from Strong Petrochemical Holdings Limited ( (HK:0852) ) is now available.

Strong Petrochemical Holdings Limited announced a further delay in the payment of its 2024 interim dividend, initially declared at HKD 0.08 per share. The payment, originally scheduled for earlier, is now set for November 28, 2025. This postponement may impact investor sentiment and reflects ongoing challenges in the company’s financial management or market conditions.

SoftOx Solutions AS has announced the election of Dr. Tore Duvold to its Board of Directors, bringing over 25 years of life science experience. His appointment is expected to enhance the company’s strategic growth and innovation efforts, particularly in addressing global health challenges related to infection and antimicrobial resistance.

SoftOx Solutions AS is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company listed on Euronext Growth Oslo, focusing on developing pan-antimicrobial pharmaceuticals targeting bacteria, viruses, and fungi.
